data.Subject: MAINTENANCE SCHEDULE for Gas Transmission Northwest (Posted: 7/10/26)
data.Text:
Gas Transmission Northwest Maintenance Schedule has been updated.  

 

Please refer to the maintenance schedule for the projected capacity impacts. Updated items are as follows:  

 

• Removed: 7/20 – 7/24 – Athol Engine Swap

• Removed: August – Eastport Engine Swap

 

Please note that the information posted is proposed and subject to change.  

 

Please direct any questions to your Account Coordinator, Customer Service Representative, or the Nominations and Scheduling hotline @ 888-750-6275

data.Subject: UPDATE: FORCE MAJEURE EVENT:  GTN – Flow Past Kingsgate (Updated: 7/9/26)
data.Text:
This is to notify all contracted parties of Gas Transmission Northwest (GTN) effective 7/10/26 Timely cycle, will be increasing capacity at Flow Past Kingsgate (LOC #3500) due to having Unit 5D back online at Athol Compressor Station (CS5). GTN continues to diligently perform repair work on Unit C, however, Unit C is still impacted by the force majeure, so pursuant to Section 6.10 of GTN’s FERC Gas Tariff, GTN is updating the Force Majeure event impacting capacity at Flow Past Kingsgate (LOC #3500). As a result, capacity will be reduced as follows:  

 

7/8 (Evening) – 7/9 Flow Past Kingsgate (LOC# 3500) Available Capacity: 2,250 MMcf/d
7/10 – 7/17 Flow Past Kingsgate (LOC# 3500) Available Capacity: 2,450 MMcf/d

 

This may result in Firm Primary, Firm Secondary and Interruptible curtailments. The Reservation Charge Crediting Mechanism of Section 5.1.3.9 shall apply to this outage.

 

Please direct any questions to your Account Coordinator, Customer Service Representative, or the Nominations and Scheduling hotline @ 888-750-6275.

data.Subject: CAPACITY REDUCTION:  GTN – Rosalia Compressor Station (Posted: 7/7/26)
data.Text:
GTN is restricting capacity at Rosalia Compressor Station due to unplanned maintenance for Unit B. As a result, capacity will be reduced as follows:

 

7/7 (Intraday) – 7/31 Station 6 CFTP (LOC #954690) – Available Capacity 2,500 MMcf/d

 

GTN anticipates this posting may result in Firm Primary, Firm Secondary and Interruptible curtailments. The Reservation Charge Crediting Mechanism of Section 5.1.3.10 shall apply to this outage.

 

Please direct any questions to your Account Coordinator, Customer Service Representative, or the Nominations and Scheduling hotline @ 888-750-6275.
